## Adding New Variables

\11. Edit `docs/_variables.yml`:

```yaml
# Add your variable
my_new_variable: "value"
```

\11. Use in any markdown file:

```markdown
The value is {{ my_new_variable }}.
```

\11. Variables are available immediately after saving.
